## Start Report (Required for non-trivial work)
- Reasoning level: `low | medium | high | very high`
- Estimated time (ETA): `<e.g., 20m>`
- Mid-report checkpoints: `<e.g., +10m, +20m>`

- What changed:
- Why:

## Scope
- In scope:
- Out of scope:

## Validation
- Local checks run:
- CI checks expected:

- Rollback plan:
